    Arlington, TX

    9/16/2021
    1 photo

    Very nice place . It's small very friendly staff . Took my order right away . Music was a little load for early morning asked to turn down done!  Food was very good as always . And I am a really picky person . I eat out every week . I hate to review because I never have to wait to eat when word gets out about this place I'm sure there will be a long wait . But it is a family run business with good people so I thought a should share. I just have to wait for the good food and service.

    Eggs Benedict

  • Esther P.
    Houston, TX
    2
    41
    7
    10/30/2021
    1 photo

    Dear Yelpers,
    I am sending you all virtual hugs for reviewing this place at such a high level that you were persuasive enough to get my butt from downtown to this place just to see if y'all were telling the truth.  You were!!! This place is a excellent!!!   The service is on point and very attentive.  We decided to try their most popular breakfast plate.  It was good but for us not enough to make us drive this far HOWEVER the pastelitos are incredible as was the empanada and the tequeno.  Y'all were right the green
    sauce is fire and takes everything up a notch.  I can't wait to return to try everything else.  You must try this place it's worth it!!!

    Also the hours are wrong on here so call the place instead if you are worried they will close soon.

    The bill for an amazing lunch!!! You must try this place!!!

    Amazing place. Always the nicest staff and people. Super clean. Nice to sit outside with my son and dog.

    Venezuelan coffee is a must try!!

    Great place overall.

    7/21/2020 Previous review

    Great place. Very helpful and nice staff. Very clean. The owner was very nice and came to say hello. Good local spot.

  • Oscar M.

    Elite 2021

    Houston, TX
    12
    44
    105
    5/23/2021
    1 photo

    Floks!!
    I like to tell you about Patelitos Cafe.
    This is a Houston well kept secret.
    This is such a nice-cute-pleasant-GREAT food place of Venezuelan (South America) food
    located by the energy corridor on Eldridge this place is so nicely decorated. Their service is superb and their food is so suculent and delicious to say the least. The owners Jose & Carolina Criollo are such a nice people.
    Carolina took good care of us.
    I can surely guarantee everything on the menu is really good. The portions are more than enough. Everything is so good that we ordered a few things because is was hard to make up our minds what to eat!
    We started with a capuchino and a big latte. Best coffe Venezuelan style. We had also empanadas....Bejond of this world. Also had the fried cheese, "Queso de Mano" and a plate with scramble eggs with tomatoes and onions with carne macheda, black beens, fried plantain and a BIG arepa on the side....Also we had a Pepito (stake sandwich) with lettuce, tomatoes and cheese....Folks...This is the best steak sandwich I have EVER HAD. The meat was so lean, juicy and tasty.
    Their natural fruit shakes are very good and fresh as they prepare them upon request.
    To finish we order an empanada with guava and cheese. Very good as well.
    Last, We took home Paella to go.
    I have to tell you that being a paella connaisseurs I have to say that for a great Paella, this is the place. Rice perfectly loose, abundance of sea food. Nice and rich color. Ever since Tio PEPE closed I have been searching for a good Paella place and this is it!.
    Last, I do really recommend this place.
    Stop by and pay a visit to Jose & Carolina. You will NOT regret it folks. We are going back soon for either food to go or seat down and enjoy such a good food and good crowd.
    Thank so much Carolina!
    Nice place you have. We will see you soon.

    PASTELITOS CAFE

  • Karen M.

    Elite 2021

    Houston, TX
    11
    145
    70
    10/22/2021

    When a restaurant has an item on its menu that shares the name of the restaurant, you order that item!!! The pastelitos at Pastelitos are some of the yummiest snacks I've had in a long time. I tried these savory pastries in potato and cheese  (delicate little clouds of happiness) and spinach alfredo (rich and heavenly).  The tequeños - a Venezuelan twist on cheese sticks - were quite tasty too. We also tried some arepas, which were good but not as uniquely amazing as the pastelitos. The coffee (authentic South American espresso) was dark and intense- just the way I like it. I couldn't help but watch every plate come out of the kitchen as I gathered ideas for ordering on my next visit.
    Side note: I visited with a bilingual friend, and most of the staff was more comfortable talking to her than to me. I'm okay with that. They were still able to answer most of my questions in English, too. But if you're the kind of person who takes issues with people who speak English as a second language, either a) get over yourself, or b) go somewhere else.

    This place is like a little slice of heaven, I look forward to my piping hot latte and sweet pastries every weekend!! The environment is welcoming and filled with warm vibes! Bon-appetite!

    Piping hot latte!

    6/5/2021 Previous review

    Pastelitos Cafe is a genuine gem! The owner and staff happily greets and appreciates their guests. The vibes and environment makes this place so inviting. The food and Venezuelan coffee is original, hot and fresh. I will be retuning for more and often for coffee to go and weekend brunches. Support your local businesses!

    Service is immaculate, The environment is very friendly And welcoming! The last time I came I left with free food! That says enough and every time the food is delicious as well! Everything is perfectly flavored!!!

    The man in the back is very nice, probably the owner very good experience here !

    First of all, I wanted to say how friendly and helpful the staff was at the restaurant. I felt like I was family because everybody was so caring. Secondly, the food was really good , and I absolutely love the Pastelitos. I came on a Saturday morning and it was quite busy , so I can see why so many people wanted to experience a good  while being treated so well.

    Coffee was so good !

Frequently Asked Questions about Pastelitos Cafe

Does Pastelitos Cafe have outdoor seating?

Yes, Pastelitos Cafe has outdoor seating.

Is Pastelitos Cafe currently offering delivery or takeout?

Yes, Pastelitos Cafe offers both delivery and takeout.

What forms of payment are accepted?

Pastelitos Cafe accepts credit cards.

How is Pastelitos Cafe rated?

Pastelitos Cafe has 4.5 stars.
